prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.8 kg; Height 165.1 cm; BMI 25.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 259mg/dL; 9 months ago 213mg/dL; 6 months ago 181mg/dL; 3 months ago 207mg/dL; current 166mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.2kg; 9 months ago 72.3kg; 6 months ago 67.9kg; 3 months ago 68.7kg; current 69.8kg), Height (12 months ago 165.1cm; 9 months ago 165.1cm; 6 months ago 165.1cm; 3 months ago 165.1cm; current 165.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 61mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 63mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 34U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 102mg/g; 9 months ago 143mg/g; 6 months ago 147mg/g; 3 months ago 114mg/g; current 130mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 70mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 71mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 107mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 111mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
